name: discord_mafia
description: Discord lobby + web dashboard bot for Mafia42 season 4 style games

scripts.dev:preview: cross-env DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=preview-token DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID=preview-app PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3010 WEB_SESSION_SECRET=preview-web-session-secret JOIN_TICKET_SECRET=preview-join-ticket-secret tsx src/dev/web-preview.ts
scripts.dev:practice: cross-env PRACTICE_SCENARIO=practice1 DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=practice-token DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID=practice-app PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3014 WEB_SESSION_SECRET=practice-web-session-secret JOIN_TICKET_SECRET=practice-join-ticket-secret tsx src/dev/web-practice.ts
scripts.dev:practice1: cross-env PRACTICE_SCENARIO=practice1 DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=practice-token DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID=practice-app PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3014 WEB_SESSION_SECRET=practice-web-session-secret JOIN_TICKET_SECRET=practice-join-ticket-secret tsx src/dev/web-practice.ts
scripts.dev:practice2: cross-env PRACTICE_SCENARIO=practice2 DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=practice-token DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID=practice-app PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3014 WEB_SESSION_SECRET=practice-web-session-secret JOIN_TICKET_SECRET=practice-join-ticket-secret tsx src/dev/web-practice.ts

scripts.dev:practice:all: cross-env PRACTICE_SCENARIO=all DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=practice-token DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID=practice-app PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3014 WEB_SESSION_SECRET=practice-web-session-secret JOIN_TICKET_SECRET=practice-join-ticket-secret tsx src/dev/web-practice.ts
scripts.test: cross-env DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=test-token DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID=test-app PUBLIC_BASE_URL=https://mafia.test WEB_SESSION_SECRET=test-web-secret JOIN_TICKET_SECRET=test-join-secret tsx --test tests/all.test.ts
